concepts_used.title: Pearson 相关系数
concepts_used.how_used: 计算原油价格与汽油价格之间的Pearson相关系数，并比较不同滞后周数的相关性，确定最佳滞后为1周。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: When we graphed scatter plots of crude oil, shifted 1-6 weeks, with the unshifted price of gas, we found that the strongest correlation between the gas and crude oil occurred when the shift was only 1 week.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 利用滞后1周的原油价格作为自变量，对汽油价格进行线性回归，建立预测模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Since this correlation was so strong, it provided a convenient way to predict what the future gas prices would be, given only the knowledge of what the price of crude oil had done over the past several weeks.

concepts_used.title: 决策树
concepts_used.how_used: 构建决策树，根据预测的汽油价格趋势和当前油量，决定消费者应购买满箱、半箱或不购买。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Once we had a model for predicting prices, we used a decision tree to develop an algorithm for how much gas a consumer should buy on a given week in order to be cost efficient.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 使用预测误差百分比（1.63%）和理想花费偏差（1%）来评估模型性能。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Our model ... predicts future gas prices with only 1.63% error, and recommends a buying pattern that differs only 1% from the ideal spending that would occur if consumers actually knew future gas prices.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出并论证了5条关键假设，包括购买增量、相关性持续性、市场滞后、消费者行为、原油价格代表性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumptions and Justifications: Customers will only buy gas in half and full tank increments. ... The historical correlation of crude oil and gas prices will continue. ... It takes time for the gas market to respond to changes in crude oil prices. ... People would like to minimize their expenditure on gas ... The trend in the average of the Brent and WTI crude oil prices is representative ...

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用散点图分析不同滞后周数的原油价格与汽油价格的相关性，以确定最佳滞后。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: When we graphed scatter plots of crude oil, shifted 1-6 weeks, with the unshifted price of gas, we found that the strongest correlation between the gas and crude oil occurred when the shift was only 1 week.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分清晰重述问题，并列出模型假设及其合理性，结构规范。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Introduction: Restatement of the Problem: ... Assumptions and Justifications: ...
